mapper.select: SELECT user_id, status, last_active_time FROM chat_user_status WHERE user_id = #{userId}

SELECT user_id, status, last_active_time FROM chat_user_status WHERE user_id IN
#{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE chat_user_status SET status = #{status}, last_active_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT user_id, status, last_active_time FROM chat_user_status WHERE status = 'online'
